## InstallXOptions.vueOptions property

This object can contain any option to pass to Vue instance at the moment of creating the App instance.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
vueOptions?: VueConstructorPartialArgument;
```

## Example


```typescript
{
  vueOptions:{
    i18n,
    router
  }
}
```
